name: 30-minute Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round steak, cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan sprayed with nonstick cooking spray, brown the meat.
2. Add water, mushrooms (including liquid), and soup mix to the pan.
3. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, blend yogurt and flour; stir into the meat mixture.
5. Cook on low heat until the mixture thickens.
6. Serve over hot noodles.
